createdVia.description: Free-form provenance tag. One of `self_serve`, `invite`, `scim`, `import`. Used by the F.2 admin user-detail surface and to bucket audit reports across provisioning paths.

emailVerifiedAt.description: Mirror of WorkOS `emailVerified` state. Mirrored at JIT-create and SCIM-sync time so audit code can answer "did this person ever verify their email?" without round-tripping to WorkOS.

workosUserId.description: Linked WorkOS user id (`user_…`). Populated by the importer for pre-existing accounts and at JIT-create time for new accounts.
